title: Magical Dutch Pancakes with Fish
description: A unique fusion of Dutch pancake tradition with a magical twist, using fresh fish. Perfect for a special breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Mix Magical Dutch Pancake Mix with Large Eggs and Milk in a large bowl.
Add Fish (Cod or Halibut) to the bowl and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add Butter to the pan.
Pour the pancake batter into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve the pancake with Sushi Rice Vinegar and Sushi on top.
Bake the pancake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until cooked through.
